projects.name: Super Store Performance Dashboard
projects.description: Super Store Performance Dashboard (Power BI) – Developed an interactive dashboard to analyze sales, costs, and profit, with insights on category distribution, regional performance, city-level profitability, and yearly trends. Designed to help decision-makers easily understand business performance and identify top-performing markets.

projects.name: HR Dashboard
projects.description: HR Dashboard in Excel – Built a comprehensive dashboard using Pivot Tables to analyze HR data, showing key metrics like employee count & gender distribution, average performance, skills, leave tracking, salaries, age groups, regional distribution, and employment status. First hands-on experience turning raw data into actionable insights.

projects.name: Sales & Finance Dashboard
projects.description: Sales & Finance Dashboard (Excel) – Built a simple interactive dashboard in Excel using Pivot Tables to track total sales, revenue, expenses vs. profit, top product performance, and monthly trends. A foundational project for visualizing key business metrics clearly.
